mapper.select: select id, user_id, type_id, body, `like`, created_at from share_board where user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, user_id, type_id, body, `like`, created_at FROM share_board WHERE created_at >= CASE
WHEN WEEKDAY(NOW()) = 0 AND HOUR(NOW()) < 6 THEN DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY), INTERVAL 6 HOUR)
ELSE DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(NOW()) DAY), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) END ORDER BY created_at DESC

select id, user_id, type_id, body, `like`, created_at from share_board WHERE created_at >= CASE WHEN WEEKDAY(NOW()) = 0 AND HOUR(NOW()) < 6 THEN DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) ELSE DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(NOW()) DAY), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) END order by `like` desc, created_at desc limit 5
